properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v1 v2 v3 v4 v3 v3 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You're calling me to a deeper place You're calling me to come away This is the day that you have made To walk in your love and your grace.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I will sing to you my king Forever and ever

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I will rise up, and worship your holiness I will sing a song of your faithfulness From the mountain, to the valleys Your love will be my peace And I'll sing of your love for me.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I will sing of your love…

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I will rise up, and worship you, worship you. I will rise up, and worship you, worship you. I will rise up, and worship you, worship you.
